news.headline: Nasa launches 4 astronauts on world’s first crewed lunar mission in half a century
news.summary: <p>Four astronauts blasted off from Florida on Wednesday on Nasa’s <a href="https://www.dawn.com/news/1985202">Artemis II mission</a>, a high-stakes voyage around the moon that marks the United States’ boldest step yet toward returning humans to the lunar surface later this decade
